instruction: ஈரோடு பகுதியில் மஞ்சள் சாகுபடிக்கு ஏற்ற மண் வகை எது?
output: ஈரோடு மற்றும் சுற்றியுள்ள கொங்கு மண்டலப் பகுதிகளில், நன்கு வடிகால் வசதியுள்ள செம்மண் (Red Loam) மற்றும் இருமண் கலந்த நிலங்கள் (Sandy Loam) மஞ்சள் சாகுபடிக்கு மிகவும் ஏற்றவை. மண்ணின் கார அமிலத்தன்மை (pH) 6.0 முதல் 7.5 வரை இருப்பது சிறந்தது.

instruction: How to manage stem borer pest in my maize crop near Pollachi?
output: The stem borer is a common pest for maize in the Pollachi region. To manage it, you should first remove and destroy affected plants. For control, you can release the egg parasitoid, Trichogramma chilonis, or spray solutions like Emamectin Benzoate 5% SG. Always follow the recommended dosage.

instruction: Coimbatore la தென்னை மரத்துக்கு water management எப்படி பண்றது?
output: கோயம்புத்தூர் பகுதியில் தென்னைக்கு நீர் மேலாண்மை மிகவும் முக்கியம். கோடை காலத்தில் 4-5 நாட்களுக்கு ஒரு முறையும், குளிர் காலத்தில் 7-10 நாட்களுக்கு ஒரு முறையும் நீர் பாய்ச்ச வேண்டும். சொட்டுநீர்ப் பாசனம் (drip irrigation) பயன்படுத்துவது நீரைச் சேமிக்க சிறந்த வழியாகும். ஒரு மரத்திற்கு ஒரு நாளைக்கு சுமார் 40-50 லிட்டர் தண்ணீர் தேவைப்படும்.

instruction: What is the correct fertilizer dose for rain-fed cotton in the Kongu region?
output: For rain-fed cotton (மானாவாரிப் பருத்தி) in the Kongu belt, the recommended fertilizer dose is typically 40:20:20 kg of NPK per hectare. This should be applied as a basal dose, ideally using farm yard manure (FYM) to improve soil health and water retention.

instruction: நாமக்கல் பகுதியில் கோழிப் பண்ணை அமைக்க என்ன அரசு மானியம் உள்ளது?
output: நாமக்கல் மாவட்டத்தில் கோழிப் பண்ணை அமைக்க, தமிழ்நாடு அரசின் கால்நடை பராமரிப்புத் துறை மூலம் பல திட்டங்கள் உள்ளன. தேசிய கால்நடை இயக்கம் (National Livestock Mission - NLM) கீழ் மானியங்கள் வழங்கப்படுகின்றன. மேலும் விவரங்களுக்கு, உங்கள் அருகில் உள்ள கால்நடை மருத்துவமனை அல்லது மாவட்ட ஆட்சியர் அலுவலகத்தில் உள்ள கால்நடை பராமரிப்புத் துறையை அணுகவும்.

instruction: My groundnut leaves are showing yellow spots with brown rust patches underneath. What is this?
output: This is a classic symptom of Tikka leaf spot, a common fungal disease in groundnuts. To control it, spray Mancozeb or Chlorothalonil at the first sign of the disease and repeat after 15 days. Also, ensure proper spacing between plants for good air circulation.

instruction: திருப்பூர்ல சின்ன வெங்காயம் பயிரிட சிறந்த பருவம் எது?
output: திருப்பூர் மற்றும் அதன் சுற்றுவட்டாரப் பகுதிகளில் சின்ன வெங்காயம் (Shallots) பயிரிட ஆடிப் பட்டம் (ஜூன்-ஜூலை) மற்றும் கார்த்திகைப் பட்டம் (அக்டோபர்-நவம்பர்) ஆகியவை சிறந்த பருவங்கள் ஆகும்.

instruction: Explain the benefits of Uzhavan app for farmers in Tamil Nadu.
output: The Uzhavan (உழவன்) app, launched by the Government of Tamil Nadu, provides real-time information on crop insurance, subsidy schemes, market prices in nearby regulated markets, weather forecasts, and farm machinery rentals. It is an essential tool for every farmer in the state.

instruction: சேலம் பகுதியில் மரவள்ளிக்கிழங்கில் மாவுப்பூச்சி தாக்குதலை எப்படி கட்டுப்படுத்துவது?
output: சேலம் பகுதியில் மரவள்ளிக்கிழங்கில் மாவுப்பூச்சி தாக்குதல் பொதுவானது. இதை கட்டுப்படுத்த, பாதிக்கப்பட்ட செடிகளை அகற்றி அழிக்க வேண்டும். இயற்கையாக, அனகைரஸ் லோபேஸி (Anagyrus lopez) ஒட்டுண்ணிகளை ஏக்கருக்கு 200 என்ற எண்ணிக்கையில் விடலாம். ரசாயன முறையில், புப்ரோபெசின் 25% SC அல்லது தையோமீத்தாக்சாம் 25% WG போன்ற மருந்துகளை பரிந்துரைக்கப்பட்ட அளவில் தெளிக்கலாம்.

instruction: What is the market price for coconuts in the Kangayam market today?
output: I am an AI assistant and cannot provide real-time market prices as they change daily. However, you can find the current daily prices for coconuts in the Kangayam regulated market by checking the Tamil Nadu Agricultural Marketing Board (TNSAMB) website or using the Uzhavan app.

instruction: How to apply for a soil health card in the Erode district?
output: To get a Soil Health Card in Erode, you can approach your nearest Uzhavar Maiyam (Farmer's Center) or the Assistant Director of Agriculture's office. They will collect a soil sample from your farm for testing, and you will receive a card with the nutrient status and a customized fertilizer recommendation for your crops.

instruction: Best banana variety for cultivation near Mettupalayam?
output: The Mettupalayam region is famous for the Nendran variety of bananas, which is highly valued for both fruit and chips. Other popular varieties that grow well in this region include Robusta and Poovan. The choice depends on your target market and local soil conditions.

instruction: கறவை மாடுகளுக்கு தீவனப் பற்றாக்குறையை சமாளிப்பது எப்படி?
output: கறவை மாடுகளுக்கு தீவனப் பற்றாக்குறையை சமாளிக்க, அசோலா (Azolla) போன்ற மாற்றுத் தீவனங்களை வளர்க்கலாம். இது அதிக புரதச்சத்து கொண்டது. மேலும், யூரியா கலந்த வைக்கோல் (Urea Treated Paddy Straw) மற்றும் ஊறுகாய்ப் புல் (Silage) தயாரித்து சேமித்து வைப்பதன் மூலம் கோடை காலத்தில் தீவனத் தட்டுப்பாட்டை நிர்வகிக்கலாம்.

instruction: Is drip irrigation subsidized in Tamil Nadu?
output: Yes, the Tamil Nadu government provides significant subsidies for installing drip irrigation systems under the Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana (PMKSY). Small and marginal farmers can get up to 100% subsidy, while other farmers get up to 75%. You can apply through the horticulture department's website or office.

instruction: Sugarcane ku red rot disease vandha enna pannanum?
output: கரும்பில் சிவப்பு அழுகல் நோய் (Red Rot) வந்தால், அது பயிரை முழுமையாக நாசம் செய்துவிடும். பாதிக்கப்பட்ட சோகைகளை உடனடியாக அகற்றி எரித்துவிட வேண்டும். நோய் இல்லாத கரணைகளை மட்டுமே விதைக்கப் பயன்படுத்த வேண்டும். மேலும், கார்பென்டாசிம் (Carbendazim) மருந்தில் கரணைகளை நனைத்து விதைப்பது நோயைத் தடுக்க உதவும்.

instruction: Explain the role of a Farmer Producer Organization (FPO).
output: A Farmer Producer Organization (FPO) or உழவர் உற்பத்தியாளர் அமைப்பு is a group of farmers who come together to form a collective. The main goal is to improve their bargaining power when buying inputs like seeds and fertilizers, and when selling their produce. FPOs help farmers get better market access and prices.

instruction: How to prepare Panchagavya and what are its uses?
output: Panchagavya is an organic growth promoter. It is prepared by mixing cow dung, cow urine, milk, curd, and ghee, and allowing them to ferment. It is used as a foliar spray to improve plant growth, increase immunity against diseases, and enhance yield.

instruction: தரிசு நிலங்களை விவசாய நிலங்களாக மாற்ற அரசு உதவி செய்யுமா?
output: ஆம், தமிழ்நாடு அரசு தரிசு நிலங்களை மேம்படுத்த ' கலைஞரின் அனைத்து கிராம ஒருங்கிணைந்த வேளாண் வளர்ச்சித் திட்டம்' போன்ற திட்டங்களின் கீழ் உதவி செய்கிறது. இந்த திட்டத்தின் மூலம், தரிசு நிலங்களை கண்டறிந்து, அவற்றை சீர்திருத்தி, நீர் ஆதாரங்களை உருவாக்கி, விவசாயம் செய்ய மானியங்கள் வழங்கப்படுகின்றன.

instruction: What are the common weeds in a turmeric field and how to control them?
output: Common weeds in a turmeric field in the Kongu region include Cynodon dactylon (அறுகம்புல்) and Cyperus rotundus (கோரைப்புல்). Control can be done by hand weeding at 30, 60, and 90 days after planting. Pre-emergence herbicides like Metribuzin or Pendimethalin can also be applied within 3 days of planting, after irrigation.

instruction: Where can I get certified seeds in Coimbatore?
output: For certified seeds in Coimbatore, the best and most reliable source is the Tamil Nadu Agricultural University (TNAU) campus. They have a dedicated seed centre that sells high-quality, certified seeds for various crops suitable for the region. You can also check with the State Seed Farms run by the Department of Agriculture.

instruction: மஞ்சள் பயிரில் கிழங்கு ஈ தாக்குதலை কিভাবে தடுப்பது?
output: கிழங்கு ஈ தாக்குதலைக் கட்டுப்படுத்த, அறுவடைக்கு 20 நாட்களுக்கு முன்பு வேப்பம் புண்ணாக்கை ஏக்கருக்கு 100 கிலோ இட வேண்டும். மேலும், விளக்குப்பொறிகளை (light traps) வைத்து தாய் ஈக்களை கவர்ந்து அழிக்கலாம். தாக்குதல் அதிகமாக இருந்தால், குயினால்பாஸ் (Quinalphos) போன்ற மண் மருந்துகளைப் பயன்படுத்தலாம்.

instruction: What is the process of curing turmeric after harvesting in Erode?
output: Turmeric curing involves boiling the fresh rhizomes in water for about 45-60 minutes until they become soft. They are then sun-dried for 10-15 days until they are hard and break with a metallic sound. This process is crucial for developing the color and aroma.

instruction: Is intercropping possible with turmeric?
output: Yes, intercropping is highly beneficial with turmeric. Short-duration crops like small onions (shallots), coriander, or green chillies can be grown in the inter-rows. This provides additional income and helps in weed suppression.

instruction: My coconut trees are affected by Eriophyid mite. What is the solution?
output: Eriophyid mite infestation causes nuts to become small and scarred. The TNAU-recommended control method is to apply a neem-based solution. Mix 20ml of Azadirachtin 1% (Neem oil) with garlic emulsion and spray on the bunches. Root feeding of TNAU's Coconut Tonic can also increase the tree's resistance.

instruction: பொள்ளாச்சி பகுதியில் தென்னையில் ஊடுபயிராக என்ன பயிரிடலாம்?
output: பொள்ளாச்சி பகுதியில் தென்னந்தோப்புகளில் ஊடுபயிராக வாழை, ஜாதிக்காய், மிளகு, மற்றும் கொக்கோ போன்றவை வெற்றிகரமாகப் பயிரிடப்படுகின்றன. இது விவசாயிகளுக்கு கூடுதல் வருமானம் தருவதோடு, நிலத்தின் வளத்தையும் மேம்படுத்துகிறது.

instruction: What is the purpose of a coconut climbing machine?
output: A coconut climbing machine is a device that helps a person safely and quickly climb coconut trees for harvesting nuts and cleaning the crown. It reduces the dependency on skilled climbers, which are becoming scarce, and improves safety.

instruction: Fall Armyworm attack in my maize crop. What is the organic control method?
output: For organic control of Fall Armyworm ( படைப்புழு) in maize, you can spray a 5% solution of neem seed kernel extract (NSKE). Also, erecting bird perches can encourage birds to feed on the larvae. Releasing the parasitoid Trichogramma pretiosum is also an effective biological control method.

instruction: What is a good drought-resistant sorghum variety for the Kongu region?
output: For rain-fed cultivation in the Kongu region, sorghum (cholam) varieties like CO 30 and K 12 are excellent choices. They are drought-tolerant, have good grain yield, and provide substantial fodder for livestock.

instruction: மானாவாரி நிலத்தில் நிலக்கடலை விதைப்பதற்கு முன் நிலத்தை எப்படி தயார் செய்வது?
output: மானாவாரி நிலக்கடலைக்கு, கோடை உழவு செய்வது மிகவும் முக்கியம். இது மழைநீரை சேமிக்கவும், களைகளைக் கட்டுப்படுத்தவும் உதவும். கடைசி உழவின்போது, ஏக்கருக்கு 5 டன் மக்கிய தொழு உரம் (FYM) இடுவது மண்ணின் ஈரப்பதத்தை தக்கவைக்க உதவும்.

instruction: தக்காளி செடியில் இலை சுருட்டு நோய் வந்தால் என்ன செய்வது?
output: தக்காளி இலை சுருட்டு நோய் என்பது ஒரு வைரஸ் நோயாகும், இது வெள்ளை ஈக்களால் பரவுகிறது. இதைக் கட்டுப்படுத்த, டைமெத்தோயேட் அல்லது இமிடாகுளோபிரிட் போன்ற மருந்துகளைத் தெளித்து வெள்ளை ஈக்களைக் கட்டுப்படுத்த வேண்டும். நோய் தாக்கிய செடிகளை உடனடியாகப் பிடுங்கி அழித்துவிட வேண்டும்.

instruction: How to increase the shelf life of small onions (shallots)?
output: To increase the shelf life of shallots, they must be properly cured. After harvesting, spread them in a thin layer in a well-ventilated, shady place for about two weeks. This allows the neck to dry completely, preventing rot. Storing them in a Pattarai (traditional ventilated storage structure) is ideal.

instruction: Brinjal fruit and shoot borer is a major problem. How to manage it?
output: To manage brinjal fruit and shoot borer, you must follow an integrated approach. Install pheromone traps to monitor and trap male moths. Remove and destroy affected shoots and fruits. Spraying neem oil regularly can prevent egg-laying. For severe infestations, alternating sprays of Emamectin benzoate and Chlorantraniliprole is effective.

instruction: What is the ideal green fodder for dairy cows in this region?
output: For dairy cows in the Kongu region, high-yielding green fodder varieties like Co-FS 29 or Co-FS 31 Fodder Sorghum are ideal. They provide excellent nutrition and can be harvested multiple times. Legume fodders like Lucerne (குதிரை மசால்) are also excellent protein sources.

instruction: நாமக்கல் பகுதியில் கோழிகளுக்கு வரும் வெள்ளை கழிச்சல் நோயை தடுப்பது எப்படி?
output: கோழிகளுக்கு வெள்ளை கழிச்சல் நோய் (Ranikhet disease) வராமல் தடுக்க, முறையான தடுப்பூசி போடுவது ஒன்றுதான் வழி. முதல் தடுப்பூசியை குஞ்சு பொரித்த 7-வது நாளிலும், பூஸ்டர் தடுப்பூசிகளை கால்நடை மருத்துவரின் அறிவுரைப்படியும் போட வேண்டும். பண்ணையின் ശുചിത്വവും மிகவும் முக்கியம்.

instruction: How to make Azolla for feeding cattle?
output: To cultivate Azolla, create a shallow pit (2m x 2m x 0.2m) lined with a silpaulin sheet. Fill it with a mixture of sieved soil and water. Add a small amount of cow dung slurry and super phosphate. Then, introduce fresh Azolla culture. It will grow rapidly and can be harvested daily to be fed as a protein-rich supplement for cattle.

instruction: How to prepare Jeevamirtham?
output: Jeevamirtham is a microbial culture that enriches the soil. To prepare it, mix 10 kg of native cow dung and 10 litres of cow urine with 2 kg of jaggery, 2 kg of gram flour, and a handful of soil in 200 litres of water. Let it ferment for 48 hours and then apply it to the soil with irrigation water.

instruction: What is the benefit of using vermicompost?
output: Vermicompost (மண்புழு உரம்) is an excellent organic fertilizer. It improves soil aeration, texture, and water-holding capacity. It is rich in essential plant nutrients and beneficial microorganisms, which suppress diseases and promote healthy plant growth.

instruction: பூச்சிகளை விரட்ட பயன்படும் மூலிகைப் பூச்சி விரட்டி தயாரிப்பது எப்படி?
output: மூலிகைப் பூச்சி விரட்டி தயாரிக்க, தலா 1 கிலோ நொச்சி, வேம்பு, மற்றும் எருக்கு இலைகளை இடித்து, 10 லிட்டர் மாட்டு கோமியத்தில் ஊறவைத்து 15 நாட்கள் நொதிக்க விட வேண்டும். பின்னர், அதை வடிகட்டி, 1 லிட்டர் கரைசலுக்கு 10 லிட்டர் தண்ணீர் கலந்து செடிகள் மீது தெளிக்கலாம்.

instruction: What is PM-KUSUM scheme?
output: The PM-KUSUM scheme promotes the use of solar energy in agriculture. Under this scheme, farmers can get subsidies to install standalone solar-powered pumps and to solarize their existing grid-connected pumps, reducing their dependency on electricity and diesel.

instruction: How can I get a subsidy for a power tiller in the Tiruppur district?
output: To get a subsidy for a power tiller, you need to apply under the Agricultural Mechanization Scheme. You can register on the Uzhavan app or contact your local Assistant Executive Engineer (Agricultural Engineering) office. Subsidies are generally provided based on farmer category and availability.

instruction: What are the recommended irrigated rice varieties for the Samba season in the Coimbatore region?
output: For the Samba/Late Samba season (August-September) in the Western Zone, including Coimbatore, Tiruppur, and Erode, the recommended rice varieties are CO 52, TKM 13, VGD 1, CO 43, Improved White Ponni, TNAU Rice Hybrid CO 4, CO (R) 50, ADT(R) 46, TNAU Rice ADT 49, and ADT 39.

instruction: How should I treat my rice seeds with Carbendazim before sowing?
output: To treat your rice seeds, soak them in a Carbendazim, Pyroquilon, or Tricyclozole solution at a concentration of 2 grams per liter of water for every 1 kg of seeds. After soaking the seeds in plain water for 10 hours and draining, use this wet seed treatment method. This protects seedlings from blast disease for up to 40 days.

instruction: Ennaoda nel payir la pugaipaan (BPH)பிரச்சனை இருக்கு, enna pannalam?
output: For Brown Planthopper (BPH), avoid excessive nitrogen fertilizer and control irrigation by draining the water intermittently. Direct your spray towards the base of the plants. You can spray Acephate 75% SP at 666-1000 g/ha or Neem oil 3% at 15 lit/ha. Avoid using synthetic pyrethroids as they can cause resurgence.

instruction: My soil has a sub-soil hard pan. How can I fix this?
output: Sub-soil hard pans in red soil areas can be reclaimed by chiselling the soil with a chisel plough at a 0.5 meter interval, first in one direction and then in the direction perpendicular to it. This should be done once every two to three years. After chiselling, applying 12.5 tonnes per hectare of Farm Yard Manure (FYM) or composted coir pith can bring about a 30% increase in yield.

instruction: How can I manage vegetable waste from my farm sustainably?
output: You can manage large volumes of vegetable waste by converting it into organic fertilizer through vermicomposting. This process uses earthworms to decompose the waste, creating a nutrient-rich compost. This is a viable and sustainable technology that can also generate additional income by marketing the vermicompost.

instruction: What is the general fertilizer recommendation for irrigated maize hybrids?
output: If a soil test is not available, the blanket recommendation for irrigated hybrid maize is 250:75:75 kg of NPK per hectare. It's best to apply a quarter of the Nitrogen and the full dose of Phosphorus and Potassium basally before sowing.

instruction: My maize leaves are showing purplish green colour in the early stages. What deficiency is this?
output: Purplish green leaves during the early growth of maize is a classic symptom of Phosphorus deficiency. This can lead to slow, spindly growth and irregular ear formation.

instruction: How can I control Fall Armyworm in my maize crop organically?
output: For organic control of Fall Armyworm (Spodoptera frugiperda), you can spray a 5% solution of Neem Seed Kernel Extract (NSKE). You can also erect bird perches to encourage birds to feed on the larvae, and release the parasitoid Trichogramma pretiosum for biological control.

instruction: What is the ideal sowing time for rainfed cotton in the Virudhunagar district?
output: In Virudhunagar district, pre-monsoon dry seeding for rainfed cotton is recommended during the 38th to 39th meteorological standard week, which corresponds to September 17th to September 30th.

instruction: Ennoda paruthi sediyil 'Reddening' varuthu. Itha sari seiya enna pannalam?
output: When reddening occurs in cotton leaves, you can apply a foliar spray of 0.5% Magnesium Sulphate (MgSO4), 1.0% Urea, and 0.1% Zinc Sulphate (ZnSO4). This spray should be applied on the 50th and 80th day after sowing to correct this malady.

instruction: What is the benefit of using a 'TNAU Sugarcane Sett Cutter'?
output: The TNAU Sugarcane Sett Cutter is a machine designed for cutting sugarcane setts with a single bud. It has a capacity of 1500 setts per hour and causes less damage compared to manual cutting, making the process more efficient.

instruction: I want to grow groundnut in the Chithiraipattam season in Erode. Which variety should I choose?
output: For the Chithiraipattam season (April-May) in Erode under irrigated conditions, you can choose from the following groundnut varieties: TMVGn 13, VRIGn 6, VRI 8, CO 7, TMV 14, and BSR 2.

instruction: How and when should I apply gypsum to my groundnut crop?
output: Apply gypsum (Calcium Sulphate) at a rate of 400 kg per hectare. The application should be done by the side of the plants on the 40th to 45th day of sowing. After applying, hoe the soil to incorporate the gypsum and then perform earthing up. This encourages pod formation and better filling.

instruction: How do I control Tikka leaf spot in groundnut?
output: Tikka leaf spot, a common fungal disease, can be managed by spraying Carbendazim at 500 g/ha or Mancozeb at 1000 g/ha. If necessary, repeat the spray after 15 days.

instruction: What is the seed rate for rainfed sorghum?
output: For a direct sown rainfed sorghum crop, the recommended seed rate is 15 kg per hectare.

instruction: Sola kathir la puzhu iruku, enna pannurathu?
input: My sorghum earheads are infested with caterpillars.
output: For earhead caterpillars (Helicoverpa armigera) in sorghum, you can set up sex pheromone traps at 12 per hectare. You can also apply NPV at 1.5 x 10^12 POB on the earheads. For chemical control, you can apply Malathion 5D at 25 kg/ha or Phosalone 4D at 25 kg/ha.

instruction: How can I make Sorghum Flakes?
output: Sorghum flakes are a nutritious value-added product. They are nutritionally superior to rice flakes and are an ideal breakfast and snack food. The processing technique is simple and low-cost, making them quick to cook and easily digestible. A 100g serving contains approximately 8.6g protein and 69mg calcium.

instruction: I'm a farmer in the Cauvery Delta Zone. What is a good blackgram variety for the rice fallow season?
output: For the rice fallow season (January) in the Cauvery Delta Zone (Thanjavur, Tiruvarur, Nagapattinam), the recommended blackgram varieties are ADT 3, ADT 6, KKM 1, VBN 6, and VBN 9.

instruction: My blackgram and greengram plants have yellow mosaic virus. How do I manage it?
output: To manage Yellow Mosaic Virus, which is spread by whiteflies, it is best to grow resistant varieties like VBN 6 or VBN 8 for blackgram. You should also install 12 yellow sticky traps per hectare and rogue out infected plants. To control the whitefly vector, you can spray Methyl Demeton 25 EC at 500 ml/ha or Dimethoate 30 EC at 500 ml/ha.

instruction: What is the purpose of a 'Farmers Club' mentioned in the NABARD case study?
output: A Rajiv Gandhi Farmers Club, as seen in the Meenakshipuram village case, acts as a formal intermediary channel. It helps impoverished families, even those without property rights, to organize. The club can facilitate access to institutional support, promote initiatives like organic farming, and market their collective produce under a common brand name, like 'Sirumalai'.

instruction: Tell me about the CO(Rg) 7 Redgram variety.
output: Co(Rg) 7 is a short-duration redgram variety maturing in 120-130 days. It's suitable for Purattasipattam, Markazhipattam, and summer irrigated seasons. The grain yield is around 950 kg/ha under rainfed conditions and 1168 kg/ha under irrigation. The plant is semi-spreading with reddish-brown grains.

instruction: How to manage pod borers in Redgram?
output: To manage pod borers like Helicoverpa armigera, you can set up 12 pheromone traps per hectare and install 50 bird perches per hectare. For biological control, you can use HaNPV at 3 x 10^12 POB/ha. Chemically, you can spray Azadirachtin 0.03% WSP at 2.5kg/ha or Emamectin benzoate 5% SG at 220 g/ha.

instruction: What is the blanket fertilizer recommendation for rainfed Cumbu?
output: For rainfed cumbu (pearl millet) varieties, the blanket fertilizer recommendation is 70:35:35 kg of N, P2O5, and K2O per hectare. For hybrids, it is 80:40:40 kg of NPK per hectare.

instruction: How do I control Downy Mildew in Cumbu?
output: To manage Downy Mildew in Cumbu, you should grow resistant varieties like Hybrid CO 9 or CO 10. Also, rogue out any infected seedlings. You can spray Metalaxyl + Mancozeb at 500 g/ha or Mancozeb alone at 1000 g/ha.

instruction: En Ragi payir la 'Blast' noi iruku, athai eppadi kattuppaduthurathu?
input: My Ragi crop has Blast disease, how to control it?
output: To control Blast disease in Ragi (Finger Millet), avoid excess nitrogen application. You can spray Carbendazim 50WP at 500 g/ha or Tricyclozole 75 WP at 500 g/ha after observing the initial infection. For biological control, seed treatment with Pseudomonas fluorescens (10 ml/kg) and foliar sprays (5 ml/l) are effective.

instruction: What is the ideal spacing for transplanting irrigated Ragi?
output: For irrigated transplanted Ragi, you should plant 2 seedlings per hill at a depth of 3 cm. Adopt a spacing of 30 cm between rows and 10 cm between plants.

instruction: Tell me about the CO (CP) 7 Cowpea variety.
output: CO (CP) 7 is a Cowpea variety suitable for all districts. It is a short duration crop of 70-75 days. The green pods can be used as a vegetable. It yields about 1000 kg/ha in rainfed conditions and 1600 kg/ha in irrigated conditions. The grains are brownish-white and square-shaped.

instruction: What are the benefits of coconut husk burial?
output: Burial of coconut husks in basins or trenches helps to overcome drought and button shedding. You can bury about 100 husks per palm with the concave surface facing upwards in circular trenches. This practice helps preserve monsoon rainwater and improve soil moisture.

instruction: How to manage Rhinoceros beetle in Coconut?
output: To manage the Rhinoceros beetle, you must maintain good garden sanitation by removing and burning dead coconut trees. You can incorporate the fungus Metarhizium anisopliae in manure pits, which are breeding grounds for the pest. You can also place 3 naphthalene balls per palm in the inner leaf sheaths once every 45 days, or set up rhinolure pheromone traps at a rate of 1 per 2 hectares.

instruction: What is the recommended fertilizer dose for perennial castor variety YTP 1?
output: For the perennial castor variety YTP 1, which is often grown as a border crop, the fertilizer recommendation is 30 kg Sulphur/ha through gypsum at the time of last ploughing. Additionally, apply NPK based on soil tests. A blanket recommendation is 45:15:15 NPK kg/ha for rainfed varieties.

instruction: How do you control the Semilooper pest in Castor?
output: To control Semiloopers in Castor, you should encourage the activity of the larval parasitoid, Microplitis maculipennis. You can spray Azadirachtin 0.03% at 1000 ml/ha or Chlorpyrifos 20EC at 1250 ml/ha at fifteen-day intervals if needed.

instruction: What is the ideal season for growing VRI (Sv) 2 sesame in the Coimbatore region?
output: For the irrigated tracts in the Western Zone, including Coimbatore, the VRI (Sv) 2 sesame variety is best sown during Masipattam, which is from February to March.

instruction: What is the cultural method to control Shoot & capsule borer in sesame?
output: To manage the shoot and capsule borer (Antigastra catalaunalis) in sesame, you can use botanical sprays. Applying a 5% Neem Seed Kernels Extract (NSKE) or a 2% Neem oil solution is an effective cultural control method.

instruction: How can I improve seed set in my sunflower crop?
output: To improve pollination and seed set in sunflower, you can perform mechanical pollination during the mid-flowering phase (between 9:00 and 11:00 am). This involves gently rubbing the flower head with a hand covered in a soft cloth or rubbing two flowers face to face. Additionally, a foliar spray of 0.2% boric acid at the ray floret opening stage helps improve seed set and filling.

instruction: How do I manage head rot disease in sunflower?
output: Head rot in sunflower, caused by Rhizopus sp., often occurs during intermittent rainfall. To manage it, spray Mancozeb at 1000 g/ha, directing the spray to cover the capitulum (flower head). If humid weather continues, repeat the spray after 10 days.
